user.title: BYD EV Pro
user.description: Set up your BYD vehicle. Enter a name for your vehicle.

webhook_info.title: Webhook URL
webhook_info.description:
Copy this webhook URL and paste it into the BYD EV Pro app on your car:

**{webhook_url}**

The app will push vehicle data to this URL. Click Submit to finish setup.

settings.title: BYD EV Pro Settings

add_action.title: Add Voice Action
add_action.description: Pick a script and set voice phrases. Only the script is required — fill in just the languages you use.
